title: Giant T. Rex Fossil Could Fetch a Monster Price at Sotheby’s
description: Named Gus, the skeleton is expected to net $20 million to $30 million—the highest estimate ever fixed to a dinosaur fossil. The post Giant T. Rex Fossil Could Fetch a Monster Price at Sotheby’s appeared first on Artnet News .

title: Ancient DNA reveals previously unknown migration into South America
description: A DNA study reveals a previously unknown migration from Mesoamerica into South America around 1,300 years ago.

title: In 2010, fossil feathers under a microscope revealed dinosaur colours for the first time
description: Scientists have unlocked the vibrant colours of dinosaurs by examining microscopic fossilised structures called melanosomes. These tiny organelles, found in ancient feathers and skin coverings, reveal the actual pigmentation of creatures like Sinosauropteryx and Anchiornis. This breakthrough transforms our understanding of these prehistoric animals, moving beyond guesswork to evidence-based reconstructions of their appearance.

title: 'Goddess of War' statue unearthed in ancient biblical city in 'incredible' discovery
description: A colossal 2-metre white marble statue of Athena has been uncovered in the ancient Turkish city of Laodicea, mentioned in the Bible, and is almost perfectly preserved

title: Astrea Beauty Officially Launches In The U.S., Blending Modern Clean Beauty With Ancient Siddha Wisdom
description: NEW YORK, May 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Astrea Beauty, the conscious luxury skincare brand rooted in the ancient healing science of Siddha medicine, has officially launched in the United States, introducing a new generation of holistic skincare that blends centuries-old botanical wisdom...
